import io
import string

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s) s
  when None ""
  end
  let trimmed = string.trim(line)
  let n = match string.parse_int(trimmed)
  when Some(v) v
  when None 0
  end
  mut i = 1
  while i <= n
    let m3 = i % 3
    let m5 = i % 5
    if m3 == 0 and m5 == 0
      println("FizzBuzz")
    else if m3 == 0
      println("Fizz")
    else if m5 == 0
      println("Buzz")
    else
      println("#{i}")
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  Ok(())
end
